title: Ninja, a Band of Assassins
actors: Raizô Ichikawa, Shiho Fujimura, Yûnosuke Itô
plot: A young ninja becomes embroiled in a plot to kill a tyrannical warlord. He journeys across feudal Japan, facing deceit, betrayal, and enemy ninja at every turn. Goemon must complete his mission, regain his honor, and survive.
